subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! Verily Thy servant Nazim was one who suppressed his anger, pardoned sins and wrongs, and showed kindness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ان عبدک ناظم کان کاظم الغیظ و العافی عن الذنب و الضیر و یحسن الی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @eulogies; reminiscences, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love
